# Requirement: FR-003

- Title: Reliable consultant contact conversion path
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall provide a contact conversion path with at least one direct communication channel, clear response expectations, and reliable navigation from all key entry points on desktop and mobile.

## Rationale

A generic or unclear contact flow reduces inquiry confidence and prevents qualified leads from taking action. The contact path must reinforce consultant positioning.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Top-level navigation contains a contact entry.
- Contact section includes at least one direct channel and clear response expectation text for consultation requests.
- Contact copy reinforces consultant positioning for AI, automation, and software problem solving.
- All contact entry points resolve correctly on desktop and mobile breakpoints.

## Success Metrics

- All contact routes and CTA links pass navigation checks on key pages and mobile/desktop breakpoints.

## Non-Goals

- Server-side form processing, CRM integration, spam scoring workflows.

## Constraints

- No secret exposure, static-first implementation in Phase 1.
